vegOnlyDetails.title: Showing only vegetarian options.
vegOnlyDetails.description: Tap on the VEG ONLY button to turn off the setting

tooltip.displayText: Kids Favourites Filter applied. Remove this filter to see the full Menu.

info.name: Porotta (2 Pcs ) + Kozhi Uruli Roast (2 Pcs)
info.description: Crispy Malabar porottas paired with spicy, slow-roasted chicken uruli — a fiery and filling combo made for true food lovers.

info.name: Chapathi (2) + Chicken Pal Curry Combo
info.description: Soft kerala idiyappam with a traditional Kerala recipe made with coconut milk and turmeric powder. Served with tender chicken and hearty potatoes on the side

info.name: Romali (2) + Chicken Pal Curry
info.description: Delicate idiyappams paired with tender chicken simmered in a mildly spiced coconut stew — a wholesome and satisfying combo for one.

info.name: Lebanese Shawarma (normal) + Classic Lime Juice
info.description: Juicy, perfectly spiced Lebanese-style shawarma roll served with chilled lime juice — a delicious grab-and-go combo for one.

info.name: Tcr Mini Biriyani + Classic Lime Juice
info.description: A mini feast from Thrissur! Flavourful biriyani rice layered with aromatic masala, served with refreshing lime juice — perfect for a quick, hearty meal.

info.name: 2 Idiyappam + Veg Kuruma
info.description: Soft, steamed idiyappams served with rich, creamy vegetable kuruma — the perfect light South Indian comfort meal for one.

info.name: Egg Biriyani
info.description: | Serves 1 |Indulge in our flavorful Egg Biriyani, made with premium Jeerakasala rice and tender boiled eggs. Pair it with refreshing raita, tangy pickle, or sweet pineapple for a complete meal.

info.name: Veg Biriyani
info.description: | Serves 1 |Our flavorful vegetable biriyani features a mix of seasonal vegetables with Jeerakasala rice / kaima, served with raita, pickle, and a vegetable cutlet on the side. Enjoy a complete meal in one dish!

info.name: TCR Dum Chicken Biriyani
info.description: Experience the rich, fragrant layers of Thalassery Dum Chicken Biriyani, a culinary gem from Kerala. Infused with spices, tender chicken, and fluffy rice, this dish is layered for an irresistible taste and mesmerizing aroma. Perfect for gatherings or a special family meal, each bite offers a delightful journey through South Indian flavors.

info.name: CASA Dum Chicken Biriyani
info.description: | Serves 1 |Indulge in the perfect blend of Kerala and Hyderabadi flavors with our Casa Dum Chicken Biryani. Made with Kerala Hyderabadi fusion masala and authentic spices, served with raita, pickle, and pineapple.Serves for 1 with a peice of pineapple,pickle, raitha and an egg

info.name: IDLY SET
info.description: 3 idili served with two types of chutny and sambar

card.name: Thomson's Casa
